w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Sree AI is a modern AI-powered SaaS platform that provides users with access to advanced AI capabilities including chat, voice interaction, and image generation.
Support multiple AI models (via NVIDIA NIM)
Enable secure “Bring Your Own API Key” functionality
Support both platform and user-provided API keys
Use AI chat, voice, and image tools
Prefer using their own API keys
Use AI for productivity and content creation
If still fails → show error to user
User submits API key via UI
Key is encrypted (AES) and stored in database
Backend retrieves and decrypts key when needed
Chat responses streamed in real time
Retry buttons for failed AI calls
Build Sree AI as a scalable, secure, and modular SaaS platform—not a demo product.
